common.earnMore: Earn more coins with bonuses or referrals

section1.title: 1. Game Currency
section1.item1: The app uses only virtual coins.
section1.item2: Coins cannot be exchanged for real money.
section1.item3: Balances increase via bonuses, wins, or referrals.

section2.title: 2. Predictions
section2.item1: Players place forecasts on whether news sentiment will be Positive or Negative.
section2.item2: Once a forecast is placed, it cannot be changed or canceled.
section2.item3: Outcomes are determined by an AI model analyzing news content.

section3.title: 3. Rewards
section3.item1: Winners receive their stake back plus a share of the losing pool (minus a small platform fee).
section3.item3: Bonus coins may be limited (e.g., max per hour from activity).

section4.title: 4. Presale Simulation
section4.item1: The presale is fully virtual and for entertainment only.
section4.item2: Invest coins across 12 rounds to receive tokens at fixed rates.
section4.item3: No real financial transactions are involved.

section5.title: 5. Referrals
section5.item1: Invite friends using your personal link.
section5.item2: Referral rewards are given only in coins from the game's reserve fund.

section1.title: 1. Forecast
section1.item1: Every 5 minutes you can bet on the next news: Positive or Negative.
section1.item2: Once placed, a bet cannot be changed.

section2.title: 2. Daily Forecast
section2.item1: Once per day you can bet which type of news will dominate in 24h.
section2.item2: The button is in the header until you place your daily bet.

section3.title: 3. Rewards
section3.item1: Winners get back their coins + a share of the bank.
section3.item3: A small platform fee is applied.

section4.title: 4. Coins
section4.item1: Coins are virtual only, no real money.
section4.item2: Earn more via daily login, referrals, or by winning bets.

section5.title: 5. Presale
section5.item1: Invest coins across 12 rounds to get tokens.
section5.item2: It's just a game, no real financial value.

section6.title: 6. Referrals
section6.item1: Share your referral link to invite friends and earn bonus coins.
section6.item2: Referral rewards depend on invited users' activity.

short.title: Make your forecasts on the next news
short.description: You can place a forecast once every 5 minutes

long.title: Place your forecasts for the next 24h
long.description: You can place a forecast once in the first half of the day

forecast.resultIsReady: Result is ready — check it now.

result.title: Result
result.emptyDescription: Place your forecast to see results here
result.newsProcessing: The news is being processed, please wait for the round to finish
